end (big endian, 2 bytes)            | 126:128     //  +--------------------------------------------------+     //  |  event emitter (contract address) (20 bytes)     | 128:148     // iavl proof (x bytes)                            |     //  +--------------------------------------------------+"},"returns":{"chainId":"The chain ID of the source chain","emittingContract":"The address 97:101   |  source chain ID            (big endian, 4 bytes) |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 101:109  |  peptide height             (big endian, 8 bytes) |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 109:117  |  source chain block height  (big endian, 8 bytes) |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 117      |  number of log messages     (1 byte)              |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 118:150  |  txSignature (high)         (32 bytes)            |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 150:182  |  txSignature (low)          (32 bytes)            |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 182:214  |  programID                  (32 bytes)            |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     // 214:216  |  (currLogMsgDataEnd,logMsg) (2 bytes, X bytes)    |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+     //          |  iavl proof                 (x bytes)             |     //          +---------------------------------------------------+"},"returns":{"chainId":"The ID of the chain the proof is encoded in this following format:     // +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+     // header:   |  number of paths (1B) | path-0 start (1B) |  prefix...  |  varint(len(key)) |     // +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+     // path-0:   |  path-0 suffix start (1B)  |  path-0 suffix end (1B)  |  path-0 prefix... |  path-0 suffix... |     // +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+     // ...       | params.proof: The complete cross-chain proof data containing log identifiers, returned from the prove api.

returns.blockNumber: The block number where the event was emitted (extracted from bytes 109-117)
returns.logIndex: The index of the log within the receipt (extracted from bytes 121-125)
returns.receiptIndex: The index of the receipt within the block (extracted from bytes 117-121)
returns.srcChain: The source chain ID (extracted from bytes 97-101)

params.proof: The complete cross-chain proof data containing Polymer state information

returns.height: The height/block number of the Polymer chain (extracted from bytes 101-109)
returns.signature: The signature validating the state (extracted from bytes 32-97)
returns.stateRoot: The state root of the Polymer chain (extracted from the first 32 bytes)

parseEvent(bytes,uint8).details: Extracts components from a raw event byte array based on the number of topics

params.numTopics: Number of topics in the event (each topic is 32 bytes)
params.rawEvent: The raw event data as bytes

returns.emittingContract: The address of the contract that emitted the event
returns.unindexedData: The unindexed data of the event

ping().details: This is useful for generating an event on chains with sparse events, e.g. for a health check to test that polymer infra is working correctlyAnyone can call this method!

returns.chainId: The chain ID of the source chain
returns.emittingContract: The address of the contract that emitted the event

returns.chainId: The ID of the chain the proof is from
returns.logMessages: Array of log messages emitted by the program
returns.programID: The Solana program ID that emitted the logs

params.key: The key to verify in the iavl tree - in the case of this crossl2Prover, generated using ReceiptParser.eventRootKey.
params.root: The root of the iavl tree
params.value: The value to verify in the iavl tree - in the case of this crossl2Prover, the keccak256 hash of the log data.

inspectLogIdentifier(bytes).notice: Extracts log identifier information from a proof generated through Polymer's prove api. This is useful for finding out which log was proven for a given proof bytes.

inspectPolymerState(bytes).notice: Extracts polymer chain state information from a proof generated through Polymer's prove api. This is useful for finding out which polymer state was used to prove a log for a given proof bytes.

parseEvent(bytes,uint8).notice: Parses an event into its components: emitting contract address, indexed topics, and unindexed data

ping().notice: Emit an event that can be proven on peptide

validateEvent(bytes).notice: Validates an event proof from Polymer's prove api for a non-Solana chain.These proofs should be generated using https://proof.devnet.polymer.zoneUse `validateSolLogs` for Solana proofs.

validateSolLogs(bytes).notice: Validates an event proof from Polymer's prove api for a Solana chain.These proofs should be generated using https://proof.devnet.polymer.zoneUse `validateLogs` for non-Solana proofs.
